description: JolpicaAdapter correctly maps season schedule from API JSON to domain types
given: The Jolpica API returns valid JSON for season 2024
then: Returns SeasonSchedule with correct season, races mapped with Season/Round/RaceName/Circuit/Date/Time

description: JolpicaAdapter returns error on HTTP non-200 status
then: Returns a descriptive error containing the status code

description: JolpicaAdapter maps race results including FastestLap
given: The API returns a race result with FastestLap data for a driver
then: Returns RaceResult with DriverResults containing FastestLap.Rank, Lap, Time, AvgSpeed

given: The API returns valid JSON but RaceTable is null
then: Returns an error, not a nil pointer panic

description: JolpicaAdapter maps driver standings with position parsing
given: The API returns driver standings with string positions
then: Returns []DriverStanding with Position converted from string to domain.Position(int)

given: The API returns constructor standings JSON
then: Returns []ConstructorStanding with correct Position, Points, Wins, Constructor fields

description: JolpicaAdapter returns error on invalid JSON response

given: The API returns the latest race result
then: Fetches from /current/last/results.json and returns mapped RaceResult

description: TeamColor returns correct hex colors for known teams
given: Constructor IDs for all 10 F1 teams
when: TeamColor is called with each ID
then: Returns the correct hex color string for each team

description: TeamColor returns white for unknown constructor

when: DriverHash is called multiple times with the same input
then: Returns the same non-negative integer each time

description: Calendar handler returns 200 with race dates grouped by month
given: A schedule with races spanning multiple months
The IF1QueryPort returns an error for GetCurrentSchedule

description: GetDriverStandings uses cache on second call
given: A first call populates the cache
when: GetDriverStandings is called again with same season
then: Returns cached result without hitting the data port

description: GetFullStandings fails if constructor standings fail but drivers succeed
given: Driver standings succeed but constructor standings return error
then: Returns the constructor error (not a partial result)
